title: UAE to India flights back on track? IndiGo resumes operations, shares latest update amid Iran vs US-Israel war
summary_full: Air travel between the UAE and India is stabilising as IndiGo resumes flights to key Gulf destinations and Europe. The airline is closely monitoring the geopolitical situation, which had caused widespread disruptions. Passengers are advised to confirm flight status before heading to the airport as schedules may continue to change.
